'''ây-d-b''' ('''yadaba''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumaticize|pneumaticize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-d-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumaticize|pneumaticize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-d-b
|-
! Lemma
| yadaba
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yadabithi|yadabithi]] || [[word:yadabiji|yadabiji]] || [[word:yadabishi|yadabishi]] || [[word:yadabi|yadabi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yadabuthuth|yadabuthuth]] || [[word:yadabujuj|yadabujuj]] || [[word:yadabushush|yadabushush]] || [[word:yadab|yadab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yadabuthu|yadabuthu]] || [[word:yadabuju|yadabuju]] || [[word:yadabushu|yadabushu]] || [[word:yadabu|yadabu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yadabufuth|yadabufuth]] || [[word:yadabufuj|yadabufuj]] || [[word:yadabufush|yadabufush]] || [[word:yadabuf|yadabuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yadabethe|yadabethe]] || [[word:yadabeje|yadabeje]] || [[word:yadabeshe|yadabeshe]] || [[word:yadabe|yadabe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yadabothoth|yadabothoth]] || [[word:yadabojoj|yadabojoj]] || [[word:yadaboshosh|yadaboshosh]] || [[word:yadab|yadab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yadabotho|yadabotho]] || [[word:yadabojo|yadabojo]] || [[word:yadabosho|yadabosho]] || [[word:yadabo|yadabo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yadabofoth|yadabofoth]] || [[word:yadabofoj|yadabofoj]] || [[word:yadabofosh|yadabofosh]] || [[word:yadabof|yadabof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yadabĂŠthĂŠ|yadabĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:yadabĂŠjĂŠ|yadabĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:yadabĂŠshĂŠ|yadabĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:yadabĂŠ|yadabĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yadabathath|yadabathath]] || [[word:yadabajaj|yadabajaj]] || [[word:yadabashash|yadabashash]] || [[word:yadab|yadab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yadabatha|yadabatha]] || [[word:yadabaja|yadabaja]] || [[word:yadabasha|yadabasha]] || [[word:yadaba|yadaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yadabafath|yadabafath]] || [[word:yadabafaj|yadabafaj]] || [[word:yadabafash|yadabafash]] || [[word:yadabaf|yadabaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yadabasha|yadabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyadabasha|goyadabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyadabasha|gokiyadabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yadabnĂŒsha|yadabnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyadabnknĂŒsha|goyadabnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyadabnĂŒsha|gokiyadabnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yadabshĂ«sha|yadabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyadabnkshĂ«sha|goyadabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyadabshĂ«sha|gokiyadabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yadabrosha|yadabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyadabnkrosha|goyadabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyadabrosha|gokiyadabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yadabmusha|yadabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyadabnkmusha|goyadabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyadabmusha|gokiyadabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yadabsherasha|yadabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyadabnksherasha|goyadabnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyadabsherasha|gokiyadabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yadabngasha|yadabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyadabnkngasha|goyadabnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyadabngasha|gokiyadabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yadabyasha|yadabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyadabnkyasha|goyadabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyadabyasha|gokiyadabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yadabyamasha|yadabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyadabnkyamasha|goyadabnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyadabyamasha|gokiyadabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yadabnĂŒshĂ«sha|yadabnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyadabnknĂŒshĂ«sha|goyadabnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyadabnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiyadabnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yadabnĂŒrosha|yadabnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyadabnknĂŒrosha|goyadabnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyadabnĂŒrosha|gokiyadabnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yadabnĂŒmusha|yadabnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyadabnknĂŒmusha|goyadabnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyadabnĂŒmusha|gokiyadabnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yadabshĂ«nĂŒsha|yadabshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyadabnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|goyadabnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyadabshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiyadabshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yadabshĂ«rosha|yadabshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyadabnkshĂ«rosha|goyadabnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyadabshĂ«rosha|gokiyadabshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yadabshĂ«musha|yadabshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyadabnkshĂ«musha|goyadabnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyadabshĂ«musha|gokiyadabshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yadabronĂŒsha|yadabronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyadabnkronĂŒsha|goyadabnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyadabronĂŒsha|gokiyadabronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yadabroshĂ«sha|yadabroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyadabnkroshĂ«sha|goyadabnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyadabroshĂ«sha|gokiyadabroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yadabromusha|yadabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyadabnkromusha|goyadabnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyadabromusha|gokiyadabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yadabmunĂŒsha|yadabmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyadabnkmunĂŒsha|goyadabnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyadabmunĂŒsha|gokiyadabmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yadabmushĂ«sha|yadabmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyadabnkmushĂ«sha|goyadabnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyadabmushĂ«sha|gokiyadabmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yadabmurosha|yadabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyadabnkmurosha|goyadabnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyadabmurosha|gokiyadabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yadab|yadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:yĂŠdĂŠb|yĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyadab|hoyadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoyĂŠdĂŠb|hoyĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyadab|hohoyadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyĂŠdĂŠb|hohoyĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒyadab|nĂŒyadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒyĂŠdĂŠb|nĂŒyĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyadab|nĂŒnĂŒyadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠdĂŠb|nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻyadab|nĂŻyadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻyĂŠdĂŠb|nĂŻyĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyadab|nĂŻnĂŻyadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠdĂŠb|nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyadab|luyadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luyĂŠdĂŠb|luyĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyadab|luluyadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyĂŠdĂŠb|luluyĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyadab|liyadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liyĂŠdĂŠb|liyĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyadab|liliyadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyĂŠdĂŠb|liliyĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyadab|koyadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koyĂŠdĂŠb|koyĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyadab|kokoyadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyĂŠdĂŠb|kokoyĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyadab|keyadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keyĂŠdĂŠb|keyĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyadab|kekeyadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyĂŠdĂŠb|kekeyĂŠdĂŠb]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
